channel.title: Financial Planning Guides on FinanceCraftedSheets
channel.description: Recent content in Financial Planning Guides on FinanceCraftedSheets

item.title: 50/30/20 Budget Guide
item.description: A clear, practical guide to the 50/30/20 budget method with a $4,000 take-home example and step-by-step setup instructions.

item.title: Best Budget Templates for 2026
item.description: A practical guide to choosing the best budget templates in 2026, with a clear comparison of spreadsheets versus apps like YNAB, Mint, and EveryDollar.

item.title: How to Pay Off Debt
item.description: A practical step-by-step guide to paying off debt, including snowball vs avalanche methods and a $20,000 multi-debt example.
